title: IMD forecasts heavy rain in Arunachal Pradesh thunderstorms across several states - News On AIR
article_text:
India Meteorological Department (IMD) has forecast heavy rainfall over Arunachal Pradesh today. The weather agency said, parts of North-East India, Jammu and Kashmir, Ladakh, Karnataka, and West Bengal are likely to experience thunderstorms and lightning during the next two to three days.

It has also predicted heat wave conditions at places over Madhya Maharashtra, North Interior Karnataka, Rayalaseema and Telangana till tomorrow. According to IMD, hot and humid weather conditions are expected to prevail over Coastal Andhra Pradesh, Coastal Karnataka, Gangetic West Bengal, Gujarat, Kerala, Goa, Odisha, Tamil Nadu, Puducherry and Karaikal till the 18th of this month.
